description: You are logged into OpenSIS as the administrator (username: admin, password: Admin@123). The school's Teacher user profile currently has no module permissions configured. Configure the Teacher user profile to grant both view and edit access to the Students (students/Student.php), Attendance (attendance/TakeAttendance.php), and Grades (grades/Grades.php) modules only. Do not grant the Teacher profile access to School Setup or User Management modules.
